items.name: Roast Lamb Ribs
items.description: The showstopper. Deep-fried lamb ribs, deeply spiced with cumin and chili. Crispy outside, tender inside. Half our reviews are about this dish.

items.name: Lamb Short Ribs
items.description: Insanely tender, perfectly seasoned, full of soul. Slow-braised until the meat falls off the bone.

items.name: Lamb Chops
items.description: Tender, flavorful lamb chops grilled with cumin and Sichuan peppercorns. A Xinjiang classic.

items.name: Spiced Beef
items.description: Co-showstopper with the lamb. Tender beef slices in a rich, aromatic spice blend. Addictive.

items.name: Beef Kebab
items.description: Soft sliced beef, velvety texture, grilled over charcoal. Smoky, savory, irresistible.

items.name: Dumplings with Chili Oil
items.description: Plump, juicy dumplings swimming in smoky aromatic chili oil. Made with love. Ruins all other chili oils for you.

items.name: Hand-Pulled Noodles
items.description: La mian — noodles pulled by hand, served in a rich lamb broth with herbs. The art of Xinjiang noodle-making.

items.name: Beef Fried Rice
items.description: Delicious standout. Wok-fried rice with tender beef, vegetables, and that unmistakable Xinjiang spice.

items.name: Lamb Pilaf
items.description: Fragrant rice cooked with lamb, carrots, and raisins. A Silk Road staple, hearty and comforting.

items.name: Smashed Cucumber
items.description: Crisp cucumber with garlic, vinegar, and chili oil. Refreshing counterpoint to rich lamb dishes.

items.name: Stir-Fried Greens
items.description: Seasonal greens wok-fried with garlic. Simple, clean, essential.

items.name: Hawthorn Plum Drink
items.description: The signature drink. Sweet-tart hawthorn and plum, chilled. Cuts through the richness of lamb perfectly. Don't skip this.

items.name: Jasmine Tea
items.description: Fragrant jasmine tea, hot or iced. The classic Chinese-Muslim dining companion.

items.name: Fresh Soy Milk
items.description: Freshly made soy milk, warm or cold. Smooth, nutty, comforting.
